FAQs.text: What is fractional ownership? Fractional ownership allows multiple investors to co-own a property by purchasing shares.
What is lock-in period? Lock-in period is the minimum time investors must hold their property share before selling.
How to book a property? Users can book a property by paying the booking amount and completing KYC verification.
Can I sell my share? Yes, investors can sell their share after the lock-in period through the platform.

FinancialData.text: Rental yield is the annual income earned from a property investment, usually expressed as a percentage of property value.
Fractional investment allows investors to buy a portion of a property instead of full ownership, reducing investment cost.
Return on Investment (ROI) in real estate is calculated based on rental income and property appreciation over time.

CompanyData.text: Fracspace is a platform that enables users to co-own premium real estate properties in India and international locations.
Fracspace provides investment opportunities with lower entry cost by dividing properties into fractions.
Fracspace handles property management, legal compliance, and rental operations for investors.
